autoGenerateIdeas.title: Auto-generate Ideas
autoGenerateIdeas.description: How often the platform suggests new Ideas across your account, and how many it suggests per cycle. Applies to both standalone Ideas and Ideas spawned by your Missions.

autoBuildWorks.title: Auto-build Works
autoBuildWorks.description: How aggressively the platform builds Works from your Ideas without asking. Daily throttle caps how many Works the auto-builder may create in a 24h window; the Mission cap limits how many outstanding Ideas each Mission may queue at once.

autoRetry.title: Auto-retry policy
autoRetry.description: When an Idea build fails on a transient error (network blip, rate limit, upstream 5xx), the platform will retry automatically up to the cap with exponential backoff. Permanent failures (invalid input, unknown) never retry.

accountBudgets.title: Account-wide budgets
accountBudgets.description: Optional ceiling on total spend across every Work, Idea, and Mission in your account each calendar month. When enabled and reached, the platform pauses Idea generation + auto-build until the next cycle (or overage if allowed).

fields.missionDefaultOutstandingCap: Default outstanding-Ideas cap per Mission (-1 = unlimited)

activitySync.title: Activity Feed sync
activitySync.subtitle: Choose how the platform learns about user-facing events from this directory's deployed site (signups, item submissions, reports).

pull.label: Pull
pull.description: Platform fetches the deployed site on demand using a per-Work HMAC secret. Requires the template to expose a `/_platform/events` endpoint.

push.label: Push
push.description: Deployed site POSTs each event to the platform with a shared bearer token. Lighter coupling — template only needs to fire four fetch calls.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.description: Website events are not surfaced in the feed. Platform activity-log + generation history still appear.

rotate.label: Rotate sync secret
rotate.description: Generates a new HMAC secret. The deployed site will start using the new value only after the next deploy — redeploy required.

activitySync.rotateConfirm: Rotate the Activity Feed sync secret? The deployed site will start failing until you trigger a redeploy.
activitySync.rotateSuccess: Secret rotated. Redeploy this directory to propagate.
